title: Ancient ‘alien-like’ skulls have been found on every continent but Antarctica. Anthropologists are starting to figure out why
description: Matthew Velasco in the UNC College of Arts and Sciences discusses cranial modification among pre-Hispanic people of the Peruvian Andes and how its meanings may vary across cultures. The post Ancient ‘alien-like’ skulls have been found on every continent but Antarctica. Anthropologists are starting to figure out why appeared first on UNC Research .

title: Ancient Cambrian Microfossils Reveal Ringed Worms
description: Scientists have uncovered the earliest fossil evidence of annelids (ringed worms) in Cambrian microfossils dating back approximately 535 million years

title: This ancient palace hotel is not ancient at all
description: This beautiful property combines the modern virtues of reliable plumbing and comfortable beds with the architecture and atmospherics of a palace.
